creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Thu Feb 21 21:01:25 2013
New Revision: 312737
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312737

Log:
  - Update to 1.0.2
  - Convert to OptionsNG
  
  PR:		ports/176287
  Submitted by:	Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/distinfo
  head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/Makefile	Thu Feb 21 20:55:11 2013	(r312736)
+++ head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/Makefile	Thu Feb 21 21:01:25 2013	(r312737)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	percona-monitoring-plugins
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.2
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.percona.com/downloads/percona-monitoring-plugins/ \
 		ftp://ftp.renatasystems.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/
@@ -24,15 +24,14 @@ USE_PHP=	yes
 WANT_PHP_CLI=	yes
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
+PORTDOCS=	Changelog
 
 CACTIDIR?=	share/cacti
 
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-PORTDOCS=	Changelog
-.endif
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 do-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 .for doc in ${PORTDOCS}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${doc} ${DOCSDIR}/${doc}

Modified: head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/distinfo	Thu Feb 21 20:55:11 2013	(r312736)
+++ head/net-mgmt/percona-monitoring-plugins/distinfo	Thu Feb 21 21:01:25 2013	(r312737)

-SIZE (percona-monitoring-plugins-1.0.1.tar.gz) = 318149
+SHA256 (percona-monitoring-plugins-1.0.2.tar.gz) = da84cfe89637292da15ddb1e66f67ad9703fa21392d8d49e664ad08f7aa45585
+SIZE (percona-monitoring-plugins-1.0.2.tar.gz) = 317455

 bin/pmp-check-mysql-replication-delay
 bin/pmp-check-mysql-replication-running
 bin/pmp-check-mysql-status
-bin/pmp-check-mysql-status.~1~

 bin/pmp-check-unix-memory
 share/cacti/scripts/ss_get_by_ssh.php

 %%DATADIR%%/cacti/definitions/redis.def

-%%DATADIR%%/cacti/templates/cacti_host_template_percona_mongodb_server_ht_0.8.6i-sver1.0.1.xml
